title: Flex - Sandpaper Xtreme Plus 225mm, 25 Sheet Pack, P120 Grit - 282405 - Sandpaper for Wood and Drywall, Sand Paper Pack for Walls in Different Sizes - Home Improvement and Decorating Tools
features: ACHIEVE A FLAWLESS FINISH: Our Flex Sandpaper for walls and wood Xtreme Plus, with its high-quality P120 grit, delivers a smooth, even surface effortlessly. It's the perfect solution for sanding fully filled surfaces and removing filler burrs and unevenness on drywall and plasterboard, leaving behind a flawless finish.

OUTSTANDING SURFACE: Designed with precision in mind, the Flex Sandpaper Xtreme Plus guarantees exceptional surface quality. Whether you're a professional tradesperson or a DIY enthusiast, this sandpaper will help you achieve top-notch results, even on the most challenging surfaces.

ENHANCED SUCTION: Thanks to its multihole design, the Flex Sandpaper Xtreme Plus ensures perfect suction, significantly reducing dust and debris. This feature helps to keep your workspace clean and allows for a more efficient sanding experience, so you can focus on the job at hand.

PACK OF SANDPAPER: With a generous pack of 25 sandpaper sheets, each with a 225mm diameter, you'll have more than enough to complete your sanding projects without having to worry about running out. Enjoy uninterrupted work and consistent performance with each fresh sheet, making your tasks quicker and easier.

BUILT BY PROS, FOR PROS: We never stand still. Every tool we design is driven by commitment, ambition and a genuine passion for progress, ours and yours. We listen to our users and work together to create clever innovations that solve real on-site challenges, from refurb to automotive. You're not just performing. You're proforming, with FLEX.
